title: Move "Without a date" group to top of "My Work"
excerpt: I keep losing track of items that don’t have a due date.  I think it would be helpful to be able to move the Without a date group to the top of the page.  More control over the order that items are display on My Work wou…

posts.author: DASoholt (David Soholt)
posts.cookedHtml: I keep losing track of items that don’t have a due date. I think it would be helpful to be able to move the Without a date group to the top of the page. More control over the order that items are display on My Work would be great too.
